description_long: This object is a rectangular book with a predominantly blue cover and white spine, featuring a minimalist, pixelated design. The front cover displays a large white rectangle bordered by blue, with two black horizontal bars near the top and a larger black square below, giving it a stylized, abstract appearance. The spine is white with a central blue stripe running vertically, and a small black square near the bottom. The back cover is solid blue with no visible markings or illustrations. The book appears to be of medium thickness, with a hard, blocky structure reminiscent of stylized or digital art. There are no visible text, logos, or decorative elements aside from the geometric color blocks.
description: A blocky, blue and white book with a minimalist, pixelated front cover and a solid blue back. The design is abstract, with no visible text or illustrations.
description_view_0: The front view shows a white rectangle bordered by blue, with two black bars near the top and a large black square below, forming an abstract pattern.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the white spine with a central blue stripe and a small black square near the bottom, as well as the book's thickness.
description_view_2: The back view is entirely solid blue, with no markings, patterns, or illustrations.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the blue and white striped pattern of the spine and cover, with the book's thickness visible.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is white with a central blue vertical stripe and a small black square near the bottom. No text or decorative elements are visible.
